author: contact@svenvanee
title: MP
content: So far, of all the music apps I’ve used … the best.

author: Thomas Bellas
title: Simply, the best app for your music.
content:
I have used many music apps throughout the years, but this app bests them all. Plus, more features keep being added to the app. Making it a one stop shop for all of your music and audiobooks.

I am a lifetime member and money well spent.

author: wnn413576
title: Does not sync albums correctly
content: Songs are synced from Dropbox, but the software does not compile all my albums. When you play a song it is added to the album, but that’s a rather horrible workaround for many albums and multiple devices. The app can not really be use on this way, so I will cancel my subscription. Support is unresponsive

author: Bidibid
title: Great
content: The app is great but could use an option to find all tracks that are in the library but not yet in any playlists!

author: TheLemonLaw
title: Please add a 15/30 sec scroll button
content: I really need to be able to scroll through mixes and podcasts. Please add this.

author: Userxyxyxxxyxuxyxycgcfhxygd
title: Bad
content: These instructional pop-ups are really annoying

author: Bert_RPV
title: Horrible user interface
content: Very difficult to work with. One tries to add an album...one song gets added. Sometimes music is in the 'library', sometimes it's only played but not added to the library (and gone when you come back later). Tried for months. Giving up.

author: Gu uv chi ihh hi on v
title: Happy with it
content: Free version is usable. sometimes an add. Better than all music apps that i had to delete immediately, this one stays. I can play music from my own folders now finally, without itunes or whatever. Very usefull.

author: System II
title: Perfecte speler.
content: Ontzettend fijn programma om mee te werken. Het zit heel logisch in elkaar en dat zie je ook aan de manier waarop je alles in kunt stellen. Ik gebruik het al 4 jaar (Pro versie) en gebruik het letterlijk elke dag. Heb nu 8.300 Flac tracks op Google Drive staan en die worden perfect afgespeeld in de auto (Apple CarPlay) en via AirPlay op m’n Sonos apparatuur in huis. Hou deze app s.v.p. levend want ik gebruik hem dus heel erg veel.

author: Peter-024
title: Werkt niet meer met Synology NAS
content: Werkte altijd goed, maar nu ineens geen connectie meer met de NAS (fout 1003). Helaas moeten constateren dat Everappz totaal niet reageert op mijn vraag wat er aan de hand is. Al drie keer op drie verschillende manieren de vraag aan hen gesteld, geen enkel antwoord. Daar gaat dan dus mijn duurbetaalde lifetime premiumversie zo in de dikgevulde zakken van de makers. Echt zo jammer dit.

author: KumarMusic
title: Hallo
content: Als ik muziek stream via Apple TV, stopt de streaming na 1 nummer (het blijft niet doorgaan als je ‘m op herhalen hebt staan), via de iPhone 14. Gek genoeg doet de app dat wel op mijn iPhone 7. Zouden jullie dat a.u.b. kunnen verhelpen?

author: reijerse
title: De slechtste musicplayer
content: Eindelijk gevonden, een audiospeler die niet meer doet wat ik wil. Zeker na de laatste update. De eerste jaren prima maar nu al 2 maanden niets.

author: Kajo’s
title: Muziek
content: Ik heb de app net pas maar ik vind nu al heel erg fijn

author: Krijt
title: Best music app by far!
content: Doet alles en meer dan wat je verwacht. Zeker een upgrade naar premium waard!

author: Mr.Anderson1997
title: It’s a good music player
content: But, I’ve used it for a couple of years and mainly listen to files that are over 1 hour long, for some reason the app cuts all these files short to like 10 seconds, very disturbing. Please fix this

author: Dapples7
title: Beats them all. Even nplayer.
content:
Why : well thought out, stable, very frequent updates AND they listen to their user. Not only that they welcome their input.

And they have a timer. Genius.

author: qorgun
title: Audio twice long
content: When I copy music from a folder the music becomes twice as long as the original, and without sound.

author: gwshendrikx
title: lost purchase
content:
i purchased lifetime for like €20 and after an update i lost it, even the redeem purchase button didnt work

also all my downloaded songs were gone. Not a good app.

author: JRW356
title: Matig
content: Hoewel ik deze ook op mijn IPad heb en er content mee ben, stopt deze app na 2 nummers met afspelen. Ook als het laatste nummer in de album is uitgespeeld gaat deze niet door met afspelen van de volgende folder. Al met al een onbruikbare app op deze manier.

author: tgdh106
title: Waardeloze app
content: Totaal ondoorzichtig wat er allemaal gebeurt. Zeer gebruiksonvriendelijk. Spijt van de aanschaf.

author: Alwin78
title: Does not work
content: Chromecasting to tv does not work at all. Skips songs I select, and does not play the songs that are auto selected by the program itself…bah!

author: Nickname ONE MILLION!!!!
title: Overall handy
content:
When i slide the bar, song skips to next/ Iseus whit sicIng maps op 300MB above

Enjoyed offline mode on my ship

author: DubbelMax
title: Gapless audio
content: Great app, but sometimes gapless audio playback does not work. Can this be fixed?

author: Acorpze
title: One of the best so far
content:
From all music players I have tried, this one works decently well.
Can play my high quality/bitrate audio files very well.

The equalizer is certainly nice, most apps make you pay for full equalizer access and being able to play in the background.
Still miss audio normalization though, some of my audio is recorded at a different volume.

Love the queue feature, I can queue a entire playlist and set it on repeat/shuffle or just queue single songs.
I find this a very important feature in music players along with the equalizer.

I already have my music sorted in folders on my computer so whenever I import it to this app it’s really nice that I can just select a few folders and add all of it’s contents to a playlist, makes life so much easier.

I’ve had no real issues with the app so far other than audio normalization and music being at different volumes.

author: TinaJalab
title: Crashes
content: Not only does it crash, it also asks me to buy the pro version again. Waste of money. Don’t use.

author: majore40
title: Muziekspeler
content: Is de prijs 10,99 eenmalig voor altijd      Graag antwoord. majore40

author: Johphi
title: pCloud inloggen werkt niet
content: De app ziet er op het eerste gezicht veelbelovend uit. Helaas werkt het inloggen in pCloud niet.

author: Ron356
title: Prima muziekspeler
content: Deze speler doet alles wat je van een goede muziekspeler mag verwachten.

author: Tom1909
title: Could have been good
content:
But is not. Connectivity not working. Nas from outside LAN? Forget it. Support? Non existant; you never get an email reply. 
Look elsewhere..

author: mede8er
title: Was mooi
content: Doet niks meer na update

author: Rubeko
title: Don’t buy
content: Ok..my advice; dont buy! Im very disappointed. Before the last update the app worked fine. I dont need new features, just reliability. Now it crashes constantly at the weirdest moments. No matter what I do or change in WIFI setup, hard- and or software. I contacted the ‘developers’ but they dont respond. I waited long enough, so there it is: a very negative experience and review. At the current price of €10,00: maybe test it well before the 14 days are over. I am too late.

author: iets...
title: Best app
content: The app easily lets me add the album name and changes the cover of the song to the right album cover.

author: Glamourspark
title: Evermusic
content: Top

author: Lalalallalalakdugfeyuopnl
title: Doesnt even work
content: I downloaded a song into the app. When I restarted it, it was conpletely gone!! Not in my downloads and not in the playlist where I put it. Happened to me miltiple times. App is completely useless

author: iijaachok

content: Latest update removed all the previously synced files, my whole library is gone, that’s not how you do a migration.

author: BakRest

content: Best App ever for Offline Mp3 music player.

author: DeMoose_Music
title: At first Great! But than...
content: in the beginning the app works great, but later the app crashes in the middle of the first song.  even after hard reset the app.  a pity after paying € 6. Hopefully i will get a response or refund.

author: Fotoplezier
title: Shuffle
content: Great app! It would be Nice if the app had a shuffle function.

author: nanidafoe
title: Free offline music but crashes
content: Love the way how I can get free offline music transported to my phone but the app crashes all the time. When I open the app and press ‘shuffle’ you hear a lovely murmur and then the app closes. Plz fix this

author: Yellow Jelly 12355
title: Great for music on cloud server, with Some restrictions
content: It’s great for connecting Cloud accounts. Finally a player that support pCloud. It supports DLNA server but not DLNA playback client (so any DLNA renderer is useless). There is also no connection possible to streaming services (Qobuz, Tidal, Spotify....)

author: claudjehhhh
title: instinker
content:
snap helemaal niks van deze app
jammergenoeg al betaald voor de upgrade

author: RichardAlecStone
title: No longer forced to repurchase all your music digitally!
content: I have an extensive cd and vinyl collection and I was getting pretty fed up with Apple making it harder and harder to take the music I already physically own along with me. Evermusic allows you to rip your own cd’s, upload it to one of many cloud services and then make those files available offline again via their own app. Although Apple itself should just allow you to drag and drop your files freely, I am immensely grateful to Evermusic for making sure I can finally have all my music with me in offline form without having to pay for it over and over again.

title: Excellent
content: This app looks great, works even better and has no ubnoxious money making strategies. I have over 40GB of music stored through this app and use it multiple hours each day

author: ijzendoorn410
title: toppertje
content:
leuke player voor de cloud.
overzichtelijk en veel functies.

author: sueperuser
title: Equaliser not working anymore, only reason i installed this app..
content: Equaliser not working anymore, only reason i installed this app...

author: Mirkan070
